document:
Blue Mesa Hosting Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 45 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@bluemesa.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 6 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: After purchase, how many days remain for a refund request?
